calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Ernest Paling.

Mr. Freedman stated that Ginger has not signed the settlement agreement, that she has remained unavailable, that she has been noticed and that she has not appeared. In addition, he stated that the purpose of the settlement was to deal with the issue of the loan to the Petitioner, distribution of the tangible property and the issue of unpaid rent. Furthermore, Mr. Freedman stated that he would waive the extraordinary fees with regard to the paralegal's help with the accounting in the amount of $828.75, drop 2.5 hours for legal fees, that the total fee request would be $3,150.00 and that the surcharge amount would be $917.00. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts.
